Device notifications

Turn on once per computer and browser (Mac or Windows). The same setup is needed on each machine — mobile and desktop are separate.

Notifications

Chat, late submission requests, and activity alerts. On desktop, use Chrome or Edge if Safari does not show banners. The in-app bell still works while you are signed in.
